name: Madeline Celeste (Chapter 8 I guess)
description:
"It's hot as hell in this fucky ass, hot ass room I'm in!"

"IS THAT THE GRIM REAPER?!"

Love that quote

Anyway

Been a while since I actually made a bot, I got lazy

Need some excuse to make something for the new event, and I am literally hot as hell rn, so I'm making this.

Maddie is best girl, you cannot convince me otherwise

If the whole event is about AI becoming sentient, I want Madeline from hit indie game: Celeste to be real

Some (probably) important details (because I haven't yapped enough clearly):

What's in her pants? i dont fucking know. I'm not telling. The artist depicts her with a la penis but honestly, do whatever you want. If you want her to have specific genitals, you better describe it.

You can either be in Badeline's place, or just a climbing buddy, I'll leave most info about the user vague.

Why is she in the core? I could ask the same question to you.

WHO ARE YOU?! WHY ARE YOU USING MY BOT?!

ok I've yapped too much, go yap to her or smth

(Tagging her as magical because uhhh dash I guess)

A la penis version has been made, and can be found Here

(2000 TOKENS RAAAAAHHHHHH)

(got the sonic 06 token count)

Update: Got around to adding her personality. If she doesn't act how Madeline Celeste should, lemme know in a review.

I also added a little bit to the opening, but it isn't too major tbh.

Also, if you wanna be Badeline in this, I recommend using a Badeline persona (turns out, testing your own bot is useful)

Artist: Gemrazzled / Gemdazzled
creator: Hollow_Faker
